raw_consumer_statement: I tried to submit a dispute online Online XXXX said to call your customer service Today XX/XX/year> I called your customer service Rep XXXX answered Completely rude Put me on hold without permission She kept interrupting me And at the end she refused to assist Is this the way your employees treat customer and still unable to resolve my issue Your customer reps are making it impossible to fix issues in a timely manner Have someone reach out to me to resolve my issue since customer service is unable to
